---
title: "Raasay Exped Day 1 Sea Eagles galore "
date: 2022-09-02
categories: []
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/ro1RxqWXlWKlsMsKdHAq6K60wz8OgCAwuqOz33ldymg-768x432.jpg
---

- Distance: 28.7 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/7755813390)



![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/ro1RxqWXlWKlsMsKdHAq6K60wz8OgCAwuqOz33ldymg-768x432.jpg)
